title: NumPy Solver (Pyodide)
description:
Runs in the browser via Pyodide — always available, no server needed.

Supports: HyperbolicSolver, FreeSurfaceFlowSolver, IMEXSolver.
template:
from zoomy_core.fvm.solver_numpy import FreeSurfaceFlowSolver
import zoomy_core.fvm.timestepping as ts

solver = FreeSurfaceFlowSolver(
    time_end=0.1,
    compute_dt=ts.adaptive(CFL=0.3),
    reconstruction_order=1,
)
Q, Qaux = solver.solve(mesh, model, write_output=False)

# --- Plot result ---
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from zoomy_core.mesh import ensure_lsq_mesh
lsq = ensure_lsq_mesh(mesh, model)
nc = lsq.n_inner_cells
xc = lsq.cell_centers[0, :nc]
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 4))
for v in range(min(Q.shape[0], 4)):
    vn = list(model.variables.keys())[v] if hasattr(model.variables, 'keys') else str(v)
    ax.plot(xc, Q[v, :nc], label=vn)
ax.legend(); ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
ax.set_xlabel('x'); ax.set_title('Simulation result')
